allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match "python|marker" } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N="CPU\(s\)";E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}}, @{N="Mem\(MB\)";E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "---datalab/marker caches---"; foreach \($p in @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\.cache\\datalab","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\datalab","$env:USERPROFILE\\.cache\\huggingface\\hub"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "{0} :: {1:N0} MB" -f $p, \(\(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum/1MB\) } })

Bash(echo "=== diag.log ==="; cat "c:/Users/rishi/Desktop/PMO agentic/data/processed/_diag.log" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\\r'; echo "=== HF hub size ==="; du -sh "$HOME/.cache/huggingface/hub" 2>/dev/null; ls "$HOME/.cache/huggingface/hub" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\\r' | grep -i -E "datalab|surya|marker" )

PowerShell(Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,@{N="CPU";E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}},@{N="MemMB";E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "--- direct python exe ---"; Test-Path "C:\\miniconda\\envs\\pmo-intel-engine\\python.exe")
